# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [IEBC Voter Registration: 2.3 Million New Voters Confirmed](https://zandani.co.ke/article/iebc-voter-registration-new-voters) - IEBC voter registration ends with 2.3 million new voters as Chairperson Erastus Ethekon rules out an extension for the exercise. Get the full details.
- [The Mark of the Machine, a Creator's Burden](https://zandani.co.ke/article/the-mark-of-the-machine-a-creators-burden) - In the shadow of a new decree, a familiar weight descends upon the creator, raising questions for `x ai label kenyan creators` and beyond.
- [I&M Bank launches KSh 20 billion medium-term note programme](https://zandani.co.ke/article/i-m-bank-launches-ksh-20-billion-medium-term-note-programme) - Kenyan Corporate Bonds Surge: I&M Bank Launches KSh 20 Billion Note Programme I&M Bank Limited has initiated a KSh 20.00 billion medium-term note program, with KSh 10.00 billion sought in its initial public offer. This strategic move capitalizes on Kenya's...
- [Confirmed: WhatsApp Android Support for Old Phones to End](https://zandani.co.ke/article/whatsapp-android-support-ending) - WhatsApp Android support for phones on versions 5.0 and 5.1 will end on September 8 to enhance user security. Get the details for Kenyan smartphone users.
- [Inside the Dr Aggrey High School Fire in Taita Taveta](https://zandani.co.ke/article/dr-aggrey-high-school-fire) - Panic as Dr Aggrey High School fire erupts in Taita Taveta. Kenya Red Cross responds as students flee. The cause remains unknown. Get the details.

- [Inside NTSA Crackdown on Drug Use in School Vehicles](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ntsa-drug-crackdown-school-vehicles) - NTSA is urging Kenyans to report students using drugs in school vehicles to enhance safety. This crackdown aims to protect learners. Read the full story.
- [Shock Burnley Exit: Scott Parker Out as Club Targets Wales Boss Craig Bellamy for Return](https://zandani.co.ke/article/shock-burnley-exit-scott-parker-out-as-club-targets-wales-boss-craig) - Shock at Burnley as Scott Parker departs. The club is now eyeing Wales boss Craig Bellamy for a dramatic Turf Moor return. Read the latest news.
- [The Unsinkable Triumph of the Bristol Bears Women 2026 Season](https://zandani.co.ke/article/the-unsinkable-triumph-bristol-bears-women-2026-season) - From the grandest naval battle to the quiet ambition of women's rugby development in Kenya, history hums with tales of strategic alliances.
- [Inside Court Ruling on Kenya-US Health Data Agreement](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-us-health-data-agreement) - The High Court blocked COFEK from withdrawing a petition against the Kenya-US health data agreement to protect public interest and privacy. Read more.
